message:
feat(rust): Update Rust kernel dependencies and PyO3 bindings

This commit updates the Rust kernel implementation:

Cargo.toml (rust_src):
- Update PyO3 dependency for Python 3.14 compatibility
- Update ndarray and numpy bindings versions
- Improve feature flags for optional CPU optimizations
- Better dependency version constraints

lib.rs:
- Minor updates to PyO3 module bindings
- Improve integration with updated numpy crate
- Better error handling for tensor conversions

Cargo.lock (workspace):
- Update all Rust dependencies to latest compatible versions
- Resolve dependency conflicts
- Update transitive dependencies

The Rust kernels provide CPU-native presynaptic dynamics computation
for edge deployment scenarios where GPU is unavailable, with performance
significantly better than the Python reference implementation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
